title: Signals | iSN.BiZ Inc
description: Signals — the iSN.BiZ market intelligence program. A live forward-returns ledger surfacing alerts from a multi-source scanner stack covering EDGAR filings, prediction markets, regulatory feeds, agricultural basis, and muni bonds. Every alert is timestamped and audit-eligible.

images.alt: Signals forward-returns ledger interface showing scanner alerts, hit-rate distributions, and ticker-level return curves
Signals visual study one — scanner pipeline lattice with cross-source alert overlays
Signals visual study two — forward-return ribbon overlay across alert timestamps
Signals visual study three — ledger-grade evidence trail with delayed-feed audit window
Raw source ingestion stage — scanner fleet pulling from EDGAR, EMMA, USDA, Federal Register, and GDPR enforcement feeds
Enrichment and ticker resolution stage — alert payloads matched to instruments and signal types
Cross-signal fusion stage — overlap detection across scanners producing fused ranking scores
Publish and forward-returns stage — alert ledger row written, backfill job populating 5d 20d 60d return columns

ogImage.alt: Signals forward-returns ledger interface showing scanner alerts, hit-rate distributions, and ticker-level return curves

twitterImage.alt: Signals forward-returns ledger interface showing scanner alerts, hit-rate distributions, and ticker-level return curves

title: Phantom Browser | iSN.BiZ Inc
description: Phantom Browser — Rust + Tauri stealth browser orchestration platform built around Camoufox, BrowserForge fingerprints, Decodo residential and mobile proxies, and a multi-tier IP reputation gate (IPQS, ProxyCheck, AbuseIPDB) for OSINT, scraping, and adversarial-resistant automation.
